rulings.Case Title: EUGENIA SALGUERO ET AL VS. RICARDO ALVA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 13, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT RICARDO ALVA and GLADYS ALVA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to February 15, 2017. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to department 501 no later than January 30, 2017 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZAFIRI LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. WILLIAM SEELEY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 13, 2017 line 5. PLAINTIFF ZAFIRI LIMITED PARTNERSHIP's Motion to Amend Complaint OFF CALENDAR. The record in this case indicates that the Defendant vacated the premises on August 14, 2014. This action has not been "pending" within the meaning of CRC 2.200 since the time to appeal August 8, 2014 lapsed. Service of motion papers on the Defendant at the address that Plaintiff knows has not been a good address for Defendant for over 2 years is insufficient.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOAB INVESTMENT GROUP LLC VS. DAN WISKIND ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 13, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT ISABEL WISKIND's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.7B. No courtesy copy of the moving papers, reply or the operative complaint provided.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIE DUMABEILLER VS. JEFFREY MCNAMARA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendant And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 13, 2017 line 7. PLAINTIFF MARIE DUMABEILLER's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery and deem Admissions admitted GRANTED, subject to opposition. Admissions are deemed admitted. Defendant shall provide complete verified responses without objections to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories and request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions grant in the amount of $1,050.= (501/REQ)
